# Guide Index

- Canonical: https://olo-dot-io.github.io/Uni-CLI/guide/
- Markdown: https://olo-dot-io.github.io/Uni-CLI/markdown/guide.md
- Section: Guides

Use these pages when you are trying to accomplish a task.

| Task                    | Page                                 |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------------------ |
| Install and run Uni-CLI | [Getting Started](/guide/getting-started) |
| Connect an agent client | [Integrations](/guide/integrations)       |
| Create an adapter       | [Adapters](/guide/adapters)               |
| Repair a broken command | [Self-Repair](/guide/self-repair)         |
| Combine commands        | [Recipes](/RECIPES)                  |

Reference pages stay under [Reference](/reference/) and should describe
contracts rather than walk through a workflow.
